falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes above the 50-day moving average by 2% or more
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong bullish breakout would invalidate the HOLD signal, suggesting a trend reversal contrary to the bottom pattern assumption.

falsification_conditions.condition: The price drops below the 2024 August bottom support level (specific price: $4,200 on the S&P 500)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Breaking this key support would confirm a continuation of the downtrend, contradicting the pattern's implied bullish setup.
A blowoff top (not a bottom) would directly contradict the pattern's similarity to a bottom, invalidating the current UNKNOWN verdict.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
